In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We just wrapped up our all-staff meeting.

If you attended our livestream, I really appreciate you joining us and
learning about the next steps for our campaign. If you weren’t there — no
worries — let me share with you the major updates. Before I dive into the
details of what we discussed, I need to make a big ask.

During the meeting, we announced our plan to propel the campaign forward
and to put us on a path to win. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191011-60763&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY ]Pulling off this plan requires us to
raise $2 million in six weeks. We realize this is a lot, but we know that
with your help we can pull this off. Will you chip in $3 or
anything you can and then read the updates from the meeting?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191011-60763&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY ]Contribute $3

How the campaign is doing:

During the meeting, we released our fundraising number from last quarter
and we feel good about our growth. But one number doesn’t tell the full
story of where we’ve been, what we’ve achieved, or where we’re headed.

These past few months have changed us and shown how much is at stake in
this election. After a gunman opened fire on our friends and neighbors
here in El Paso, my team and I flew home immediately to grieve with our
community. At a deep, fundamental level, the shooting made us reflect on
what we’re doing and what we want this campaign to stand for. That’s when
I made a promise — to those places where Donald Trump has been terrorizing
and terrifying and demeaning our fellow Americans — that’s where you will
find me and this campaign.

So here’s the bottom line:

If we’re going to take this campaign to the next level and move up in the
standings, we are going to need your help right now.

I often say this is a critical moment for the country, and now it’s a
critical moment for the campaign too. We believe we have the right
message, but we need a monumental amount of money this month to make sure
we get on that debate stage in November, reach out to folks who don’t know
us yet, pay for our ads, grow our organizing team, and all the other
ingredients we need to get right so we can win this thing.

We’re setting an ambitious goal to raise $2 million in the next 6 weeks.
Everyone will be watching how we do these first 24 hours after announcing
our goal and we’re counting on you more than we ever have to help us.
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191011-60763&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY ]Will you please chip in $3 or anything you can tonight?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/17006?refcode=ema20191011-60763&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY ]Contribute $3

Let’s do this,

Beto O’Rourke

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191011footer&t=1023&refcode2=60763_444211_0nzspY&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=60763%2E444211%2E0nzspY

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

**Meet a few of the frontline Democrats that we 're working hard to re-elect**
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb445f/4bd7760e/447bf7b9/77e3f4e7/3831570986/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiIzMTRfbW9udGhseV9vY3QiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiMzE0X0VNX0ZSXzE5MTAxMl9mcm9udGxpbmVzbGF0ZV9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct?refcode=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1") **Joe Cunningham 's passion for the Lowcountry coast inspired him to become an ocean engineer.** He went on to practice law and ran for Congress in 2018 to ban offshore drilling and strengthen environmental protections. **Joe knows that climate change is the single greatest non-military threat to our nation** -- especially for frontline coastal regions, where folks see the impacts of rising sea levels and harsh storm systems firsthand.
---
| [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb445f/4bd7760e/447bf7b9/77e3f4e6/3831570986/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiIzMTRfbW9udGhseV9vY3QiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiMzE0X0VNX0ZSXzE5MTAxMl9mcm9udGxpbmVzbGF0ZV9VMV9YMSIsImUzc2dZWE5ySUgxOSI6IjI1In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_oct?refcode=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191012_frontlineslate_U1_X1") **Lauren Underwood, a nurse and public health analyst, is the youngest African American woman to serve in the House of Representatives.** She has fiercely defended the Affordable Care Act, has focused heavily on ending the gun violence epidemic, and founded the black maternal health caucus. Lauren recently introduced legislation which would require private health insurance plans to cover preventative care and prescription drugs without charging a copayment, **ensuring that more Americans can access lifesaving preventative care**. name: Mike Franken
subject: Vulnerable Mitch
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Dangerous loopholes will allow dangerous people to get their hands on dangerous weapons until we ACT.
|
---

| | Friends, Last month, the House did their duty and passed **H.R. 8, mandating expanded background checks for all gun purchases** , including private sales. But Senator McConnell has shelved this bill until either President Trump gives him NRA-cover or until Mitch grows a spine and takes a vote. Getting destructive weapons off our streets and out of our communities **IS** preventable. And we can do that by passing commonsense legislation. [**Let 's ask McConnell to do the right thing for future generations: Pass the universal background checks bill. Sign the petition here:**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2474/33365068/4a653afa/3f8bb6d3/2484457074/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/tell-mcconnell-pass-expanded-background-checks?source=20191012_em_act_mcconnellchecks") | [TELL MCCONNELL:
PASS EXPANDED BACKGROUND CHECKS](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2474/33365068/4a653afa/3f8bb6d3/2484457074/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/tell-mcconnell-pass-expanded-background-checks?source=20191012_em_act_mcconnellchecks")
---

Now folks, I've spent a lot of time in the military. So I understand the kind of training and screening it takes to use destructive, military-style weapons.
Even in the military, personnel are screened in every which way in order to handle these weapons. When not being used, they're locked away for safety. Those same weapons are available to almost anyone who wants one in America -- and that needs to change.
**Let 's face it:__**_Dangerous loopholes will allow dangerous people to get their hands on dangerous weapons until Americans act. More than 90 Americans die from gun violence every day. This is a public health epidemic, and it 's time to act._
The vast majority of Americans approve of universal background checks. This is a big deal! [**So let 's join together and call on McConnell to do something for others: Add your name now.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2474/33365068/4a653afa/3f8bb6d3/2484457074/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/tell-mcconnell-pass-expanded-background-checks?source=20191012_em_act_mcconnellchecks")
[TELL MCCONNELL:
PASS EXPANDED BACKGROUND CHECKS](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2474/33365068/4a653afa/3f8bb6d3/2484457074/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/s/tell-mcconnell-pass-expanded-background-checks?source=20191012_em_act_mcconnellchecks")
---
Let's do this together for the benefit of future generations,
Mike F.
|

name: Beshear for Kentucky
subject: What do you think, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Nothing is more fundamental to our democracy than the right to vote. It's the right that all other rights stem from, and it must be protected at all costs.
|
---

| | Peter,

**Nothing is more fundamental to our democracy than the right to vote. It 's the right that all other rights stem from, and it must be protected _at all costs_.**

Andy gets this. And as Kentucky's attorney general, he's taken action to protect and expand voting rights. He's fought to make sure Kentuckians have access to the ballot box and launched a special unit dedicated to making sure nobody is illegally stopped from casting their vote.

But that was just a first step. Andy believes that our democracy is strongest when more Kentuckians are involved in the process. Right now Kentucky ranks 35th out of the 50 states and the District of Columbia in voter turnout, so there's a lot of room for improvement -- especially before next month's elections.

That's why Andy supports policies like automatic voter registration and making it easier to cast an absentee ballot -- policies which have been successfully adopted by other states. He also believes that Kentuckians with a non-violent felony who have completed their sentences should automatically have their voting rights restored.

**What about you, Peter?[If you agree that we must protect Kentuckians' voting rights, will you let Andy know by adding your name?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579f9/ad6dc73/146d7e18/db7c309/2668897917/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://beshearcoleman.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/vr-october")**

subject: Nate Silver weighed in on our race →
body:
We can win.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c8f/4bef7a87/6b467537/287f2b0e/1724060377/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

\- Nate Silver's _FiveThirtyEight_
[Keep the momentum going >>>](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c8f/4bef7a87/6b467537/287f2b0d/1724060377/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191012-full") **
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c8f/4bef7a87/6b467537/287f2b0d/1724060377/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191012-full")****
Check this out:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c8f/4bef7a87/6b467537/287f2b0d/1724060377/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191012-full")
Nate Silver confirmed what all of us here in Maine have been feeling: _people are ready for a Senator who puts our state first._
Susan Collins has been in the Senate for 22 years. At one point, maybe she was different than other folks in Washington. But Mainers know she now stands with corporate special interests, taking over a million dollars from drug and insurance companies and voting to put Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court.

Friend,

**Taking Indiana to the world, and bringing the world to Indiana – this has always been one of Governor Holcomb’s top goals.**

_And it’s exactly what the Governor achieved on recent economic development missions to South Korea, Japan, China and India._

Gov. Holcomb led a delegation of fellow Hoosiers with the goal of continuing to build our economic and business partnerships with four major Asian nations that already have strong ties to Indiana’s economy. And -- as a fiscal conservative -- Governor Holcomb led these economic development missions without spending taxpayer dollars.

**[Add your name to bring jobs back home to Indiana >>>](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=24d4d8b8d1314d56bedcd3129105a5b9&_e=Iz5_guvQAeEzV_n60A2AuAIAz-L1tDcCalWZdz3jDHk371uo0BtB-NAekEpgSiOBtHum-imlEnUiOYrm75BLwdTsK8sSOA384FzJo3SajLpzULEq7I00J_7Cn4kuXoHrRJHn-yKqiUrI8WXK97QeNtwUwHRV7Dw8oGTHICemRgFFzrk5ZGaXrnwVKVwClHNdWb0QJpi845LIgfGIJz-I1hSnzLVDrc1qHght1z3_xmqFHsxZPaT7buSI6tQFzL7eo-8TboqDM2gLVpZYtS8Qz9I4z53hq_B4IPSIMLCA0475YH0DkUMP3Wp4sttziYAKfqYUFVrnMzY0-y73oDv0wD4LovvDyYOxCSH7zEzwYpD0NlgOA34JgtG3Prj1jOHjAXp54wUbRK_DVfSg_ncrZpCJE_IsYYi9n5UL4UeB8so%3D)**

In fact, there are 1,004 foreign-owned business establishments that support more than 193,000 jobs across the state. That includes 319 Japan-based companies, 10 South Korea-based companies, 21 China-based companies and seven India-based companies in sectors like auto manufacturing, life science and information technology.

_For Gov. Holcomb, these trips were about building up Indiana’s economy and ensuring a long and prosperous relationship with partners around the world so that the Hoosier workforce has more opportunity at home, and Hoosier businesses have access to even more international markets._

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: The GOP is continuing to silence voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, After the Supreme Court ruled that a key part of the Voting Rights Act was unconstitutional in 2013, the floodgates opened for states to pass restrictions on voting rights that disenfranchise minority voters and help keep the GOP in power. In the six years since that fateful decision, GOP legislatures and election offices closed 1,688 poll sites in 13 states, with many closed sites clustered in the South. In Texas alone, they shut down 750 polling places. In some Texas counties, that's left upwards of 75% of polling stations closed \-- which is especially disastrous in rural countries where voters must take off work, drive long distances, and wait in long lines just to exercise their Constitutional right to vote. Expanding voting rights should be a goal no matter what party you belong to \-- yet Republican-controlled state legislatures are overseeing this massive dismantling of voting rights across the country. They are gerrymandering their states' election maps, creating poll taxes, and blocking automatic voter registration, all in an attempt to pick and choose the electorate. Republicans know that their ideas aren't winning over any voters, so they now resort to silencing anyone who won't vote for them instead \-- and Democrats need to stand up to their blatant voter suppression. We need to rally and push back against the GOP's onslaught of attacks on democracy, and the only way we'll do this is vote them out and win these legislatures back. [**WDTO is ready to fight against the GOP for control of state legislatures, but we know they 're going to throw millions of dollars in dark money into every election they can, so we need your help. body:
“Democrats and the media for three years used a fog of facts and speculation to lull America into forgetting there was never..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=57f4effd55&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Ukraine Smoke and Mirrors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a4242bc15&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“Democrats and the media for three years used a fog of facts and speculation to lull America into forgetting there was never a shred of evidence of Trump-Russia collusion. They flooded the zone with another flurry of scattershot claims in their campaign against Justice Brett Kavanaugh. Republicans might bear these tactics in mind as they confront the left’s new impeachment push,” Kimberly Strassel writes.

**New this week:** [“Joe Biden worked with whistleblower when he was vice president, officials reveal”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7d5037ab0a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Why Can’t Dems Treat Trump as Fairly as Republicans Did Bill Clinton?**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc4ac080f3&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Pelosi’s Democrats are rushing to a final impeachment vote before Thanksgiving. They’re deposing witnesses behind closed doors and denying Republicans fair time to ask questions and the right to call their own witnesses,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Instead, they’re leaking negative info and withholding favorable facts.”

**Official response:** [Read the White House’s letter to House Democrat leaders.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3af64c2019&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Border Apprehensions Down for Fourth Consecutive Month**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e5a65b9439&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Border officials apprehended just over 52,000 migrants at the southern border in September—another drop in numbers for the fourth consecutive month,” Adam Shaw reports. In recent months, President Trump has negotiated deals with Mexico and Central American countries to reduce the flow of illegal immigrants into the United States.

** ****Watch:** [This is what a real border wall looks like!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acbe1dc79c&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Vice President Pence: We Need the United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement For Trade**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=031f1a4280&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Arizona Daily Star_
“While the last administration saw America lose 200,000 manufacturing jobs, since President Trump’s election, we’ve seen more than half a million manufacturing jobs created all across America,” Vice President Mike Pence writes. Once passed, “USMCA will add more than $68 billion to our economy and create another 176,000 American jobs.”
---
|
---
| [**Democrats are Wrong. Middle-Class Incomes Surging – Thanks to Trump Policies**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b81472b077&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Middle-class incomes, after adjusting for inflation, have surged by $5,003 since Donald Trump became president in January 2017,” Steve Moore writes. “In the seven and a half years that Barack Obama was president, and not including the end of the recession, which Obama inherited, incomes inched up by $1,043 (June 2009 – January 2019).”
---
|
---
| [**Melania Trump Breaks Ground on New Tennis Pavilion at White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87760dede0&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNN
“First lady Melania Trump announced on Tuesday afternoon that she had—ceremonial shovel in hand—marked the start of construction for a new White House tennis pavilion on the South Lawn,” Kate Bennett reports. “Thank you to all who will help in making this legacy piece possible for future first families,” the First Lady wrote on Twitter.

**🎬****ICYMI:** [First Lady explores the outdoors with Wyoming students](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56e70292e2&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**President Trump Keeps Promise to Tame Bureaucracy that Runs Roughshod Over Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ae0dfb5ed2&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“When President Trump took office in 2017, he promised the American people that he would clean up Washington’s regulatory overreach. He pledged to make government accountable to the people. And he has made good on his promises by driving the largest deregulation effort since President Reagan took office over 30 years ago,” Acting White House Management and Budget Director Russ Vought writes.
---
|

[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa23b/18d6a294/4ce1afbd/26d6382e/3633891378/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Dear friends, I'm Tennessee Representative Karen Camper, a proud mother, Memphian, U.S. Army veteran, and the first African American to lead Tennessee's House Democratic Caucus as Minority Leader. I'm writing today to tell you about another U.S. Army veteran, James Mackler. James closed his law practice to join the U.S. Army after we were attacked on 9/11. He stepped forward to serve in a time of crisis, learned to fly a Black Hawk helicopter, and did so with our 101st Airborne Division in Iraq. When he returned, James became a JAG officer and prosecuted military sexual assault crimes. Nearly two decades later, James is still seeking ways to serve and is running for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat. I'd like to share something you may not already know about James. When Governor Lee wouldn't schedule a public commenting forum about his illegal plan to block grant Tennessee's Medicaid funding - when Memphians were going to be denied our right to make our voices heard - James Mackler reached out to me and said, "let's host a public forum of our own." That's exactly the type of person we Tennesseans need representing us in the U.S. Senate, and I'm so proud to support his campaign. While Governor Lee has since added additional forums in Memphis and Chattanooga to the public commenting calendar, [James still wants to know how the governor's block grants will impact you. Submit your comments here or send them directly to TennCare yourself.](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa23b/18d6a294/4ce1afbd/26d6382f/3633891378/VEsE/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/landing/s191005/") James' campaign for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat is an uphill battle, but we will win when everyone wanting change joins the team to make it happen. Join this team today! Sincerely, Representative Karen Camper, District 87
Tennessee House Minority Leader | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa23b/18d6a294/4ce1afbd/26d6382c/3633891378/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191004?refcode=jme191004_m_other&refcode2=107423")

I'm writing today to tell you about another U.S. Army veteran, James Mackler. James closed his law practice to join the U.S. Army after we were attacked on 9/11. He stepped forward to serve in a time of crisis, learned to fly a Black Hawk helicopter, and did so with our 101st Airborne Division in Iraq. When he returned, James became a JAG officer and prosecuted military sexual assault crimes. Nearly two decades later, James is still seeking ways to serve and is running for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat. I'd like to share something you may not already know about James. When Governor Lee wouldn't schedule a public commenting forum about his illegal plan to block grant Tennessee's Medicaid funding - when Memphians were going to be denied our right to make our voices heard - James Mackler reached out to me and said, "let's host a public forum of our own." That's exactly the type of person we Tennesseans need representing us in the U.S. Senate, and I'm so proud to support his campaign. While Governor Lee has since added additional forums in Memphis and Chattanooga to the public commenting calendar, "" James' campaign for Tennessee's open U.S. Senate seat is an uphill battle, but we will win when everyone wanting change joins the team to make it happen. Join this team today! Sincerely, Representative Karen Camper, District 87 Tennessee House Minority Leader | | | "" | | | Paid for by James Mackler for U.S. Senate James Mackler is a member of the Tennessee National Guard and a former member of the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Tennessee National Guard, the Department of the Army, or the Department of Defense. This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com. ""

name: Tim Ryan
subject: I won't quit fighting for hard-working families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|

Folks,

_The people of Ohio are why I entered the presidential race._

I think about the families, communities, and individuals whose needs and grievances have often been left behind or -- even worse, forgotten.

This Sunday I will be addressing state Democrats at the annual state dinner. I've been working for the people of Ohio for a long time, and want to make my strongest showing there -- because I work for them.

**Before Sunday, I need to raise $15,000 so I can go on stage and share my message that Ohio is not to be forgotten, the middle class is worth fighting for, and that we can all access the American Dream.[ Will you help me reach that goal?](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ohiodems?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-++Will+you+help+me+reach+that+goal&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1")**

[**Chip in here ->**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ohiodems?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+here+rarr&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1")

I think about my neighbors, the woman who bags my groceries at the local store, the union workers who I see walking to the bus stop at the break of dawn every morning.

I have an opportunity at the Ohio Democratic Party Dinner to speak on behalf of all Ohians, and make sure that their needs and grievances are no longer left behind or forgotten -- but brought to the forefront.

But I need you to help me make the needs of Ohians, and working Americans across the country a priority.

**[Dinner is on Sunday. I need to reach my goal of $15,000 before then. Can I count on you?](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ohiodems?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Dinner+is+on+Sunday+I+need+to+reach+my+g&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1")** [DONATE](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ohiodems?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1") Fighting for these families and communities has defined my years as a public servant -- and speaking on their behalf at the dinner on Sunday is an honor I do not take lightly.

I won't stop fighting until hard working Americans are given a fair shot at achieving the soaring ideals of the American dream. [**But I need to know that you 're fighting alongside with me.**](https://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-ohiodems?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+But+I+need+to+know+that+yoursquore+fight&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_1901012_1_1")

Thanks team!

Tim

You'll want to see why
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616465d/1e3760f0/6914c9c7/5f7ee72b/161564386/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=header")
Friends --
In a minute, we're going to ask you to make a contribution to our Montana campaign, but it's important you know why.
Wilmot enlisted in the Montana Army National Guard just six months after moving to this great state. _He 's proven for decades that he puts Montanans first._
**On the contrary, Republican Senator Steve Daines has over $3,500,000 in his campaign coffers, and nearly three-quarters of that money comes from outside of Montana.**
Unlike Senator Daines, Wilmot is running to put our teachers, public lands and _all_ Montanans first.
But if Wilmot is going to win this election, we need the resources to fight back and get his message out to every Montanan.
[**So we need 250 supporters to chip in $25, $10 or even just $5 to our people-powered campaign today.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/5616465d/1e3760f0/6914c9c7/5f7ee728/161564386/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=191012-email&recurring=auto")

body:
[1]Beto for America

Yesterday we held an all-staff call with Beto, our team, and our
supporters. We revealed that this past quarter we raised $4.5 million with
an average donation of just $27.

We ended the quarter with a surge in support and we have a real shot to
win. Beto knows we have all the right ingredients for a huge breakout
moment, but we’re convinced that we need to do it within the next 6 weeks
to have a chance to grow our support, increase our name ID, and get on the
debate stage in November.

Now we’ve set an all-hands-on-deck goal of raising $2 million in the next
6 weeks. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]Can you be one of the first to donate to our goal right now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]Donate to our goal

WHERE YOUR MONEY GOES

* We won’t take a single dollar for granted. Every expense is evaluated
to make sure we are gaining new supporters or telling the story of our
campaign with the ultimate goal of winning.

* We value our people. Beto is a leader in this race by living out our
values. We pay our staff competitively and provide quality benefits.
No full-time staff member is paid below $50,400. This allows us to
attract the best and brightest campaign staff.

* We focus on building a scalable, impactful organizing program. Our
voter contact efforts are ramping up across the country — and we’re
focused on building programs that prioritize scale and impact.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]Can you make a contribution towards our $2 million goal right now?
Without your support, there’s no way for us to pull off this plan.

OUR PATH TO WIN

* Voters are still weighing their options. Only 9% of voters have made
up their minds about who they are supporting for president.

* We are telling the real story of Beto O’Rourke. Only 61% of the
electorate knows Beto, which means we have space to continue
introducing him to voters. The more people learn about Beto, the more
they like him: name recognition and favorability have climbed in
lockstep since he got into the race in March.

* We prioritize non-traditional voters and key audiences. Young people,
Latinx people, independent voters — our strongest support comes from
the kinds of audiences that don’t get polled as often. And we have
every reason to believe these voters will grow in influence in the
2020 primary electorate.

* We aren’t ignoring Super Tuesday. Early states remain a priority, but
this is a nationalized race and a massive field. We’re running to win
in Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina, and Nevada and using it to
launch us into Super Tuesday — that’s where we have real, additional
strength.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]The only way we can move down this path to win is with your financial
support. Can you contribute to help us raise $2 million?

WHAT WE NEED

* Advertising: We’re going to take Beto’s story, his vision for the
country, and his viability as a candidate directly to voters. And we
need to meet them where they are — not only in person, but on TV,
online, and yes, even in their mailboxes.

* Organizing: We have a number of programs within organizing that we’d
like to execute on, but we’re short on national organizing capacity.
Some of these programs include:

* Persuasion phone calls/texts to voters we believe are on the
fence about Beto
* A national relational persuasion program (the pilot of which
begins Monday)
* A postcard program, allowing voters in Texas who know Beto to
write directly to “fence-sitters” and share their stories
* An Online Organizing Hub, so anyone can take action from anywhere

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]We’ve set an ambitious goal of raising $2 million because it’s what we
need to fund these key programs. Can you donate now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/38307?refcode=ema20191012-60911&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=60911%2E444211%2EFW55HY ]Donate to our goal

I know that if we execute on this plan, we can win. But we’re counting on
you to make all this happen. Beto has always said he can’t win this
campaign, or create real change as president, on his own. It’s going to
take all of us.

If you’re ready to be part of making history, be one of the first to
donate towards our goal right now. It couldn’t be more important.

Thank you for all you do,

Jen O’Malley Dillon

body:
Become a part of something historic.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1619%2E377263%2EDO13zX) Yang Gang --

We’re at a pivotal moment in this campaign.

We need to go in to next week’s debate in a strong place and send the message that we are a top contender for the nomination. That’s why we’ve set a new public goal for this team -- 40,000 contributions by the time Andrew steps on the stage for the debate in Ohio on October 15th.

This goal is extremely difficult, and not many campaigns would try it, but we know the power of the Yang Gang and we’re counting on you to be the difference.

**We need you to be one of 540 people in Pennsylvania that steps up and makes a contribution of $5 or more to our campaign today. Please pitch in now:** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=5&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=1619%2E377263%2EDO13zX)

**This is our chance to vault Andrew into the top tier. Help us hit one of our most ambitious goals yet. Rush a contribution today:** [https://act.yang2020.com/go/40kGoal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=7)

Let’s do this,

Team Yang
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13077?t=6&akid=1619%2E377263%2EDO13zX)
